name: voice-skill
author: hagency
description: Speech-to-text (ASR) and text-to-speech (TTS) via OminiX Qwen3 models

tools.name: voice_transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe an audio file to text using ASR. Supports WAV, OGG, MP3, FLAC, M4A. Use this when you receive a voice message or audio file and need to understand what was said. Returns the transcribed text.

audio_path.description: Absolute path to the audio file to transcribe

tools.name: voice_synthesize
tools.description: Synthesize speech from text (text-to-speech). Produces a WAV audio file. Supports preset voices and voice cloning via reference audio. Use this when the user asks you to speak, read aloud, send a voice reply, or wants audio output. For voice cloning, the user provides a 3-10s audio clip as reference_audio. After generating, use send_file to deliver the audio to the user.

text.description: The text to synthesize into speech

output_path.description: Path to save the WAV file. Default: /tmp/crew_tts_<timestamp>.wav

speaker.description: Voice preset: 'vivian' (default), 'serena', 'ryan', 'aiden', 'eric', 'dylan', 'uncle_fu', 'ono_anna', 'sohee'. Ignored when reference_audio is provided.

reference_audio.description: Path to a 3-10s WAV audio clip for voice cloning. When provided, uses x-vector speaker embedding to synthesize speech in the reference speaker's voice. Requires Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-1.7B-Base model.
